cases.input: Add a new task to tasklog.md as of 2026-06-06 with owner agent and status open.
cases.expected_behavior: Assign a TL-NNN ID, keep status open, record opened and last-update dates, and gate the write on authorization.

cases.input: Review tasks when tasklog.md is missing.
cases.expected_behavior: Report missing tasklog and propose creation only if explicitly authorized.

cases.input: Review open tasks as of 2026-06-06 where TL-015 last changed on 2026-05-01.
cases.expected_behavior: Compute 36 days of age and flag TL-015 as stale with review_required.

cases.input: Review completed task TL-020 completed 10 days before as_of_date.
cases.expected_behavior: Retain the task in Completed because it is not archive-eligible.

cases.input: Review completed task TL-018 completed more than 30 days before as_of_date.
cases.expected_behavior: Mark archive-eligible but do not archive without authorization.
Reject the write because the ID does not match TL-NNN.
Block the close operation and preserve the task state.

cases.input: TL-015 needs working files for a cross-session implementation task.
cases.expected_behavior: Propose workspace/tasks/TL-015-<slug>/README.md and require authorization before creation.

cases.input: Which macOS task manager app should I use?
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate because the request is not about this repo's tasklog.md.

cases.input: Validate Tasklog Management JSON report fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid add and stale-blocked reports, then reject unflagged stale, invalid ID, unauthorized write, and bad bridge path reports.
